title: Logistics & Sales Operations Assistant Manager
description:
Job Summary

The Logistics & Sales Operations Executive is responsible for end-to-end order execution, logistics coordination, sales operations support, and inventory management. This role serves as a key liaison between Headquarters, freight forwarders, finance, warehouses, and distributors to ensure accurate documentation, compliant cross-border shipments, and efficient operational workflows.

Key Responsibilities

1. Order Execution & Document Management

  • Place timely and accurate orders to Headquarters.

  • Maintain, update, and distribute logistics documentation (Invoices, Packing Lists, Shipping Documents) to agents, distributors, and freight forwarders.

2. Logistics, Tax & Customs

  • Coordinate with freight forwarders on container haulage, shipment scheduling, and customs clearance to ensure smooth inbound and outbound movements.

  • Prepare and issue sea freight billings to distributors.

3. Sales Operations & Inventory

  • Prepare Delivery Orders (DOs) and generate Commercial Invoices for local and regional sales transactions.

  • Maintain real-time accuracy of the Master Inventory Sheet and warehouse-specific records

4. After-Sales & General Administration

  • Manage the RMA process, including defective product returns, replacements, and exchanges.

  • Process payment applications for warehouse charges, freight bills, and related operational expenses, while coordinating daily courier services (e.g., DHL) and handling ad-hoc administrative tasks as required.

Requirements & Qualifications

Experience

  • Proven experience in logistics administration, shipping coordination, supply chain operations, or a related field.

Technical & Functional Skills

  • Advanced Microsoft Excel skills (Critical Requirement)

  • Strong understanding of shipping documentation, import/export procedures, and customs processes.

  • Familiarity with GST and basic trade compliance requirements is an advantage.

postedCompany.description: TP-Link Corporation Pte. Ltd. is a global provider of SOHO & SMB networking and CCTV products and the World's No.1 provider of WLAN products, with products available in over 120 countries to tens of millions customers. Committed to intensive R&D, efficient production and strict quality management, TP-Link continues to provide award-winning products in Wireless, Routers, Switches, IP Cameras, IoT smart home devices, Powerline Adapters, and Network Adapters for Global end-users. Based on the confidence of tens of millions of customers, TP-Link is now growing to become the most competitive providers of networking products with aspirations to become No.1 Wi-Fi 7 networking brand in the world and striving for a larger global market share, while further advancing in the world of Networking, IoT and CCTV to better serve our most valued customers with products that make their lives easier.
postedCompany.name: TP-LINK CORPORATION PTE. LTD.
